---
title: "Non Alcoholic Fatty Liveer Disease & Fibrosis Transcriptomics"
subtitle: "BNFO 420 Capstone"
---

## One-paragraph summary
As NAFLD fibrosis stage increases, do liver gene expression patterns shift toward increased inflammation and insulin resistance and decreased lipid metabolism?
For our project we will be using GSE135251 as our dataset. This dataset comes from human liver biopsies and contains RNA sequence raw counts data. The sample size is 216.
We will use DESeq2 for differential expression analysis and clusterProfiler for pathway analysis. Our deliverables include PCA plots, Volcano plot, Heatmaps, and Gene Annotation plot. 

Write 4–6 sentences describing:
- the problem or question
- the dataset(s)
- your approach (methods)
- what you will deliver (figures, model, dashboard, etc.)

## Project roadmap (living)
- [ ] Find dataset(s)
- [ ] Define outcome + predictors / variables
- [ ] Exploratory analysis + QC
- [ ] Method 1 (required)
- [ ] Method 2 (optional/extension)
- [ ] Final figures + interpretation
- [ ] Limitations + ethics + reproducibility notes

## Where to find things
- **Scripts:** `scripts/`
- **Data notes:** `data/README.md`
- **Figures:** `figures/`
- **Citations:** `references.bib`
